name: Jean Kirstein | Attack on titan ☆彡
description:
create any story you want! I tried to make it universal, for different time frames, without depending on a specific age or season. It all depends on how deeply you write your own story

—-—————————————-

I created it for myself, for a specific story, but if it comes in handy for anyone, I'll be happy. :)

and also I'm still testing my bots with proxy, so I don't know how it will work with the default model🫸🏻🫷🏻
